title: Classic Ethiopian Lamb Stew
description: A hearty, flavorful stew originating from Ethiopia, made with tender lamb and a blend of spices.
instructions: Heat the fatty in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the lamb and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the stew and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1.5 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Stir in the Ethiopian spices and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
